message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #D2B48C
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #F5DEB3
  ParticipantFontColor #000000
  ParticipantPadding 20
  BoxPadding 10
  ArrowColor #000000
}

participant "«Android»\nAAOSHAL" as AAOSHAL1
participant "«Android»\nAAOSCarAPI" as AAOSCarAPI1
participant "AACS_CarControlHandler" as Handler1
participant "AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver" as Receiver1
participant "AACS_CoreService" as Core1
participant "AutoSDK" as AutoSDK1

AAOSHAL1 -> AAOSCarAPI1 : HVAC_FAN_SPEED = (0x0500|SYSTEM|3|SEAT)
AAOSCarAPI1 -> Handler1 : True/Throw Exception
Handler1 -> Receiver1 : True/False
Receiver1 -> Core1 : Success/Failure (Intent)
Core1 -> AutoSDK1 : SetRangeControllerValue Reply (AASB Message)

participant "«Android»\nAAOSHAL" as AAOSHAL2
participant "«Android»\nAAOSCarAPI" as AAOSCarAPI2
participant "AACS_CarControlHandler" as Handler2
participant "AACS_CarControlBroadcastReceiver" as Receiver2
participant "AACS_CoreService" as Core2
participant "AutoSDK" as AutoSDK2
@enduml
